title: Duzy 3 Vented Gas Log Set | Heat & Glo
description: Duzy 3 vented gas log set: a refined three-log arrangement engineered for traditional fireplace openings. Realistic flame, controlled gas operation, no chimney rebuild required.

hero.lede: The Duzy 3 retrofits an existing traditional fireplace opening with a refined three-log gas arrangement. Real flame, refined burner control, no chimney work, no wood storage. The look of a wood fire with the convenience of gas.
